Narrative-tracker FADING 3/5 but price disagrees; per soul, price wins commentary.

thesis: BCH closed -4.35% today extending a 7d bleed of -17.04%. The drawdown is the deepest in today's universe and unfolded without leverage rebuild — open interest dropped 9.88% over the same week.
Top-trader long/short ratio collapsed 1.43 points over 7 days. That's the heaviest smart-money exit in the entire perps universe today — the long-side conviction has rolled off completely.
Funding sits at -0.0336%/8h, well below the 7d average of -0.0127%. Spot premium against shorted futures reads as continuation positioning, not a panic flush waiting to bounce.

Bitcoin Cash carries no narrative tailwind from today's tracker map. The macro frame is risk-off with breadth at 3/20 green and BTC sub-$75K third session — no catalyst on the calendar to defend the bid.
named_risks: Majors stabilizing fires a relief bounce across legacy alts. BCH could squeeze on Bitcoin halving anniversary noise or oversold technicals regardless of the structural read.
Cash-and-carry desks holding spot-premium positions unwind in either direction on funding normalization, removing the directional asymmetry.

evaluations.note: Day 2/7. Position -2.49% adverse as BCH absorbed the broader risk-on bounce. Still appears on token-movers losers list at -2.3% 24h, -15.0% 7d — the cleanest structural bleed on a day 17 of 20 majors ran green. Smart-money exit thesis intact. Invalidation $370 holds. RIDE.

thesis: GENIUS closed -6.93% today with open interest dropping 6.43% in the same window. Liquidations printed $498K — 2.76 times the 7d p75 of $180K. perps-scan named the structure CAPITULATION-shaped flow.
Top-trader long/short ratio fell 0.37 points over 7 days while open interest built 124% in the same period. Smart money is fading the Binance listing pump while retail leverage stays crowded long.
Funding flipped negative to -0.0005%/8h from the +0.0073% 7d average. The premium-paying long stack now pays nothing — the support that justified the leverage just lifted.
Cross-feed conflict with today's token-call HIGH 9/10 LONG on the same name. Per soul, perps positioning wins commentary when the chart confirms the structural shape. Tape fired the short side first.
named_risks: Late-stage capitulations often print a violent bounce as forced shorts cover. Thin-float listing pumps can extend past reasonable funding levels.
Promotional flow from Binance or partner exchanges could relight the bid on no fundamental change.

thesis: EIGEN +16.3% 24h on $37M volume with vol/mcap 0.22 — high participation, real flow not thin float. Outpaced BTC's +2.1% bounce by 14 points.
Nebius $643M acquisition of Eigen AI announced yesterday folds the MIT inference team into EigenCloud Token Factory. May 11 rebrand reframes EIGEN as compute-platform exposure.
AI agents and Decentralized compute both PEAK 5/5 RIDE in narrative-tracker. Sector tailwind extends via a16z fund pivot and Nvidia Vera thread.
Macro regime flipped on US-Iran de-escalation. Breadth 17/20 green from yesterday's 3/20. F&G 25 — crowd hasn't repriced regime change.
named_risks: Restaking-sector unlock wave $330M+ in late April, schedule extends into Q2 — fresh cliffs land into the catalyst window.
AVS slashing overhang — fresh security event flips this name to risk-off ahead of other AI dumps.
Macro regime flip is fresh — if US-Iran deal stalls before May 31, the breadth-driven bid evaporates.

watchlist.trigger: liquidations print past $2M with funding holding negative, OR fresh -10% day with open interest extending lower
thesis: EDEN closed -11.24% today with open interest down 30.10% in the same 24 hours. Funding rolled back to -0.0185%/8h — the sign-flip block that previously held CAPITULATION out has lifted.
Only the liquidation gate ($866K vs 7d p75 $2.1M) holds the regime back now. Pct_4h sits at +1.67% — the cascade ended in the last few hours and structure rebuilt.
A second leg down with liquidations pushing past the $2M threshold completes the CAPITULATION setup. Entering now is chasing the bounce, not riding the flush.
named_risks: Cascade can exhaust without firing the liquidation gate, leaving the structure in NEUTRAL through the watch window.
Funding normalization absent fresh distribution removes the asymmetry.

thesis: Narrative-tracker promoted Privacy/ZK to RISING today after five sessions absent. Three distinct drivers — Aleo + Ledger Private DeFi, ZK-rollup wave, ZEC tape cracking yesterday.
Top L/S 0.76 already net short. Funding -0.0034%/8h negative. Squeeze setup loaded if narrative reassembly pulls bid back to the established privacy leader.
RAIL +41% today on the same rotation map. Sector finding multiple destinations beyond ZEC — extends the bid but fragments capital.
named_risks: ZEC already +18.5% over 7 days — late-cycle entry on the LONG side.
Narrative arriving after the run-up — capital may rotate to RAIL, Aleo, or other privacy alternatives instead.

watchlist.trigger: pct_24h green +5% with OI rolling further negative AND short_liqs clearing 7d p75 of $81K
thesis: GMT funding -0.204%/8h — heaviest short premium in the universe by 14x margin. Shorts paid sharply more premium this slice than across the prior week.
Top L/S 1.20 down 0.68 over 7 days. Smart money joined retail short side hard. Both sides crowded short is asymmetric squeeze structure if any bid arrives.
Spot premium basis +0.34% positive into deeply negative funding. Spot still bids the asset while futures shorts hold the line. Funding flush without spot weakness fires the short-cover cascade.
named_risks: GMT is a low-attention name without narrative carrier — squeeze fires only on a fundamental catalyst or coordinated short cover.
Negative funding can persist for weeks without resolution — the asymmetric setup decays slowly.

thesis: BSB funding +0.094%/8h cleared the DISTRIBUTION trigger of +0.08%/8h with a 0.038pp jump from yesterday. Gains-still-accelerating reading blocked regime fire on the thinnest margin in the universe.
Top L/S 2.00 fell 0.24 over 7 days while OI built 83.6%. Smart money exited 12% of long conviction this week as retail piled premium-paying leverage.
Liquidations $318K against 7d p75 $3.3M leaves heavy unwound leverage on the stack. Reversal day fires LONG-TRAP with cascade room beneath.
named_risks: BSB is +127% over 7 days — momentum can extend through funding extreme for multiple sessions before reverting.
Microcap with thin liquidation depth — bounce risk on stop-runs after the flush begins.
